历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 16456 → 65363 → 25601 → 22824. In 2023, there was an abnormal sharp decline (65363), but it quickly rebounded to 25601 in 2024 and further advanced to 22824 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 22824th place. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for science/physics category was 19 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 16, a reduction of 1 student (-5.9%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th (2026), with stable rankings in the 75–80 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with only one low-attention incident related to a film controversy, and no significant negative public opinion. On Douyin, it ranks 70th in popularity with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate short video exposure. There have been no records of admission gaps in the past five years, ensuring stable application psychology. Psychology is A+ (top nationally), Marxist Theory is A, Education is A-, and Sports Science is A-. Psychology is the university's flagship discipline, directly corresponding to Applied Psychology and Psychology (Teacher Education) in the enrollment majors, strongly attracting applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, but among the university's science enrollment majors in Sichuan, only Network Engineering falls under Computer Science. Teacher training/education majors show divided popularity and are watched. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Gaokao is approximately 535,000, a significant increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (history + physics categories combined: approximately 462,767), intensifying competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, not a local university in Sichuan, with a small enrollment scale (17 in physics category in 2025), and no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22824, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-5.9%), the significant increase in Sichuan candidate numbers (+15.6%), stable university reputation, and the appeal of the flagship psychology discipline, the enrollment reduction pushes the ranking forward, but the large increase in candidate numbers intensifies competition. These factors offset each other, resulting in slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22218, with a range of 21718–22718.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (21718–22718), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<21718), you can prioritize Tier 1 psychology majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>22718), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3. The A+ psychology discipline has outstanding strength and high social recognition, making it the most competitive major direction at this university.
